detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PrivateBank.CashOut(uint256) (PrivateBank.sol#69-89):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.call.value(_am)() (PrivateBank.sol#77)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- balances[msg.sender] -= _am (PrivateBank.sol#81)
	PrivateBank.balances (PrivateBank.sol#9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PrivateBank.CashOut(uint256) (PrivateBank.sol#69-89)
	- PrivateBank.Deposit() (PrivateBank.sol#47-65)
	- PrivateBank.GetBal() (PrivateBank.sol#13-25)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [PrivateBank.CashOut(uint256)](PrivateBank.sol#L69-L89):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.call.value(_am)()](PrivateBank.sol#L77)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [balances[msg.sender] -= _am](PrivateBank.sol#L81)
	[PrivateBank.balances](PrivateBank.sol#L9) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [PrivateBank.CashOut(uint256)](PrivateBank.sol#L69-L89)
	- [PrivateBank.Deposit()](PrivateBank.sol#L47-L65)
	- [PrivateBank.GetBal()](PrivateBank.sol#L13-L25)
